reason: This configuration targets the most critical domain shifts and class imbalances. We use `weighted_bce` (Finding 1) to address the severe taxonomic imbalance (Aves dominance) and improve the macro AUC metric. `background_mix` (Finding 3) directly simulates the transition from clean, monophonic focal recordings to complex, continuous soundscapes found in the test set. Finally, setting `GEO_SCALE_KM` to 450 km aggressively weights the training data toward the Pantanal wetlands (Finding 5), maximizing the relevance of the limited in-domain samples.
